subject: English

lesson.story_mission: Help the Reading Ranger complete the Sentence Reading Fluency trail.
lesson.objective: I can practice sentence reading fluency with careful listening, reading, or writing.
lesson.concept_explanation: This mission teaches sentence reading fluency using child-friendly models and short practice steps.
lesson.common_misconception: Learners may answer from a first clue instead of checking the whole word, sentence, or story.
lesson.real_world_connection: Readers and writers use this skill in books, signs, notes, and classroom talk.
lesson.lesson_summary: Read or listen carefully, use the model, then choose or write the answer.
lesson.mini_lesson: First study the model. Then say the sounds or words slowly. Last, check that your answer matches the prompt.

audio.text: Listen, then say it with me.
audio.label: Listen

worked_examples.text: Watch: Use the sentence_card model, name the important part, then answer.
Demo: Try one with help before independent practice.

story.text: Listen to this page. Today you will practice reading sentences smoothly in Skill World. This mission helps you read like a careful first grader. Do not read so fast that you miss what the sentence means. Press Start Mission when you are ready.
story.label: Read This Page

lesson.text: This page teaches reading sentences smoothly. Listen to the sentence, then read it with smooth phrasing. The sentence card shows words that work together to tell an idea. Do not read so fast that you miss what the sentence means. Press Next to continue.
lesson.label: Read This Page

watch.text: This page shows a worked example for Sentence Reading Fluency. The sentence card shows words that work together to tell an idea. First, listen carefully to the model. Next, think about what the question is asking. Then compare the choices or words before deciding. Press Next to continue.
watch.label: Read This Page

demo.text: This page lets you try reading sentences smoothly with help. Listen to the sentence, then read it with smooth phrasing. If you feel unsure, use the model and say the sounds, word, or sentence again. Do not read so fast that you miss what the sentence means. Press Next to continue.
demo.label: Read This Page

practice.text: This practice page helps you use reading sentences smoothly on your own. The question may ask you to read, listen, choose, or write. Do not read so fast that you miss what the sentence means. Press Read Question to hear the question, then choose your answer when you are ready.
practice.label: Read This Page

challenge.text: This challenge page gives you a little harder practice with reading sentences smoothly. Read or listen to the whole item before you answer. Use the card, sentence, passage, or picture as evidence. Press Read Question if you want to hear the question, then use the hint if you need help.
challenge.label: Read This Page

checkpoint.text: This checkpoint page checks how well you can use reading sentences smoothly. Take your time and listen for the important clue. Do not read so fast that you miss what the sentence means. Press Read Question to hear the item, answer carefully, then continue.
checkpoint.label: Read This Page

badge.text: This badge page celebrates your work on reading sentences smoothly. Think about one sound, word, sentence, or story clue you used today. Good readers listen, look back, and try again when something is tricky. Press Next to see your profile.
badge.label: Read This Page

profile.text: This profile page shows your Skill World progress. You practiced reading sentences smoothly and used reading strategies like listening, looking closely, and checking your answer. Keep practicing these skills in books and writing. You can go back to the hub when you are finished.
profile.label: Read This Page
